headline: KPMG Canada names first Head of AI Research role
summary: KPMG Canada appointed its first Head of AI Research, marking a significant organizational commitment to AI research and development capabilities. The new role signals KPMG's investment in building internal AI expertise and thought leadership.
so_what: This hire indicates KPMG is building dedicated AI research capabilities that could enhance their consulting services across all sectors including healthcare. Guidehouse may need to consider similar research leadership roles to compete.
original_title: KPMG Canada appoints first Head of AI Research - KPMG
